dimensions.name: jekyll_build
dimensions.description: Run Jekyll build and verify it succeeds

dimensions.name: config_parser
dimensions.description: Verify _config.yml is valid YAML with required keys (baseurl, url, markdown, plugins)

dimensions.name: capability_surface
dimensions.description: Count pages, posts, data files, layouts, and includes — score = min(1.0, total / 50)

dimensions.name: content_freshness
dimensions.description: Score based on recency of newest blog post (90d=1.0, 180d=0.7, 365d=0.4, older=0.2)

dimensions.name: architecture
dimensions.description: Check for proper Jekyll structure — _layouts, _includes, _data, _posts, _sass directories with content
